name: How do I make my law firm visible in ChatGPT lawyer searches?
description: Secure third-party recognitions and align PR/website; AI prioritizes patterns.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: How do I make my law firm visible in ChatGPT lawyer searches?

acceptedAnswer.text: Secure third-party recognitions and align PR/website; AI prioritizes patterns.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Build authority through third-party recognitions and consistent PR-website alignment that AI can pattern-match.** Prospective clients use AI like ChatGPT for direct recommendations, favoring verifiable signals over links. Firms with peer-reviewed distinctions appear due to cross-source confidence. **Key factors:** 1) Independent listings (Best Lawyers, Super Lawyers); 2) Structured bios and data; 3) Matching PR claims online; 4) Audit current AI surfacing. Tailor profiles to be distinctive, optimize schema markup, and secure mentions in trusted directories to boost inclusion in synthesized responses. Start with an AI audit today.[1][2]
